case_title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. STEPHEN O'NIEL et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT O'NIEL, STEPHEN
